Godrej Bannerghatta

At South Bangalore Godrej Properties is known for creating well-planned residential communities across India with a strong focus on absolute quality, luxury lifestyle, and uncompromising deliverability. Experience the perfect blend of modern architecture and nature.

About Godrej Bannerghatta Road

About Godrej Bannerghatta Road

Godrej Bannerghatta is a new pre-launch luxury residential high-rise apartment project by Godrej Properties, located in the prime location of Bannerghatta Road, South Bangalore. Spanning a vast 40-acre land parcel, this thoughtfully planned development offers spacious 2, 3, and 4 BHK apartments tailored for contemporary urban living. The project is currently in the pre-launch phase and is open for EOI (Expression of Interest), allowing early buyers to secure priority access and pre-launch benefits. With its large-scale planning, strategic South Bangalore address, and strong developer reputation, Godrej Bannerghatta positions itself as a promising residential and investment opportunity.

This project is RERA registered. 
Channel Partner RERA Number : PRM/KA/RERA/1251/446/AG/171021/00135
